title: Radeon Optimized Pro
description: Tired of the hassle of finding the right mods? We've got you covered! Discover beautifully curated mod selections that reduce your workload and maximize your fun.
body:
# 🎮 Next-Level Minecraft Performance Modpack – Crafted for Integrated Graphics, Loved by All

Unleash the **ultimate Minecraft experience** with a powerful **hybrid modpack** that combines the best of **NeoForge and Fabric**. This unique integration pushes Minecraft performance beyond limits. Specifically engineered for **integrated graphics systems**, it delivers **140+ FPS on the latest Minecraft** even on a modest Ryzen APU – showing that top-tier performance is possible on low-end hardware.

---

## 🛠️ What Makes This Modpack Stand Out?

- ✅ Just **24 carefully curated mods** (Differentiates between Modpack Version)
- ✅ **370+ FPS** tested on Ryzen Vega 8 (Fullscreen)
- ✅ **1290 FPS** in Windowed Mode on capable systems
- ✅ **Render Distance: 9**, **Simulation Distance: 8** (Updated for Latest Minecraft 1.21.7)
- ✅ Fully compatible with **both NeoForge and Fabric mods** (Certain Modpack Versions Only)
- ✅ Powered by **NeoForge enhancements**, **Fabric integrations**, **Embeddium**, and more
- ✅ **50% better performance than OptiFine**

---

## 💡 Why You’ll Love It

Whether you're running on **integrated graphics** or have a dedicated GPU, this modpack is built to **maximize your performance** while preserving mod compatibility and smooth gameplay. It’s lightweight, efficient, and fine-tuned for Minecraft enthusiasts who want more from their machines.

---

## 🚀 Perfect For:

- Players with **integrated graphics** (APUs or low-end PCs)
- Fans of **Fabric** and **NeoForge** looking for a unified experience
- Gamers seeking **insane FPS boosts** and low overhead
- Anyone who wants a **no-bloat, high-performance** modded Minecraft setup

---
